page.title: Dialect Clustering Workspace
page.description: Use the staged workflow by default and keep quick run available in the advanced panel.

input.title: Input Setup
input.description: Configure groups, locations, and advanced options before previewing the task.
input.pathStringsHint: Reuse the existing Middle Chinese condition builder to generate path_strings.
input.resolvedCharsPlaceholder: Enter characters separated by spaces, commas, or new lines
input.locationDescription: Reuses the existing location and partition input component.

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: Check the task size before moving into prepare.
preview.continueHint: After preview is ready, continue into prepare.

prepare.title: Prepare
prepare.description: Prepare turns normalized input into reusable staged resources.

distance.title: Distance
distance.description: Choose a phoneme mode to build or reuse a distance_hash.
distance.ready: Distance for the selected mode is ready

clustering.title: Cluster
clustering.description: Configure the algorithm to produce a result_hash.

quickRun.title: Quick Run
quickRun.description: Advanced mode: run the one-shot /jobs flow and jump straight to the final result.

result.title: Cluster result
result.description: Shared result rendering for staged and quick run outputs.
result.empty: No cluster result yet. Finish the workflow first.

errors.invalidInput: Please complete a valid group and location setup first.
errors.groupDimensionRequired: Each group needs a compare dimension.
errors.groupSourceRequired: At least one group must contain a valid character source.
errors.locationRequired: Select at least one location or region.
errors.previewExpired: The preview has expired. Please create a new preview.
errors.prepareExpired: The prepare result has expired. Please run prepare again.
errors.distanceExpired: The distance result has expired. Please rebuild distance.
errors.resultExpired: The cluster result has expired. Please rerun the cluster step.
errors.taskExpired: The current task expired. You can rerun the current step.
errors.taskConflict: The dependent task is still running. Please wait.
errors.restart: The backend failed while processing this task. Please retry or reset the workspace.
